Rockstar Games</title><meta name="description" content="Vice City, USA. Jason and Lucia have always known the deck is stacked against them. But when an easy score goes wrong, they find themselves on the darkest side of the sunniest place in America, in the middle of a criminal conspiracy stretching across the state of Leonida — forced to rely on each other more than ever if they want to make it out alive."/><link rel="canonical" href="https://www.rockstargames.com/VI/"/><link rel="alternate" hrefLang="en-US" href="https://www.rockstargames.com/VI/en-US"/><link rel="alternate" hrefLang="de-DE" href="https://www.rockstargames.com/VI/de-DE"/><link rel="alternate" hrefLang="es-ES" href="https://www.rockstargames.com/VI/es-ES"/><link rel="alternate" hrefLang="es-MX" href="https://www.rockstargames.com/VI/es-MX"/><link rel="alternate" hrefLang="fr-FR" href="https://www.rockstargames.com/VI/fr-FR"/><link rel="alternate" hrefLang="it-IT" href="https://www.rockstargames.com/VI/it-IT"/><link rel="alternate" hrefLang="ja-JP" href="https://www.rockstargames.com/VI/ja-JP"/><link rel="alternate" hrefLang="ko-KR" href="https://www.rockstargames.com/VI/ko-KR"/><link rel="alternate" hrefLang="pl-PL" href="https://www.rockstargames.com/VI/pl-PL"/><link rel="alternate" hrefLang="pt-BR" href="https://www.rockstargames.com/VI/pt-BR"/><link rel="alternate" hrefLang="ru-RU" href="https://www.rockstargames.com/VI/ru-RU"/><link rel="alternate" hrefLang="zh-TW" href="https://www.rockstargames.com/VI/zh-TW"/><link rel="alternate" hrefLang="zh-CN" href="https://www.rockstargames.com/VI/zh-CN"/><meta property="og:title" content="Grand Theft Auto VI - Rockstar Games"/><meta property="og:description" content="Vice City, USA. style="position:absolute;border:0;width:1px;height:1px;padding:0;margin:-1px;overflow:hidden;clip:rect(0, 0, 0, 0);white-space:nowrap;word-wrap:normal">Xbox Series X|S</span></div></div></div></div><div class="jlzlp21"><div data-track="intro" data-track-offset="60" data-track-if="lofi" data-theme="_1nfc5stm" data-theme-offset="10%" class="x6lozz1"><div class="x6lozz2"><h3 class="x6lozz3 l56esfn l56esf2 l56esf0 l56esfo">Vice City, USA.</h3><p class="x6lozz3 l56esfn l56esf2 l56esf0 l56esfp">Jason and Lucia have always known the deck is stacked against them. But when an easy score goes wrong, they find themselves on the darkest side of the sunniest place in America, in the middle of a criminal conspiracy stretching across the state of Leonida — forced to rely on each other more than ever if they want to make it out alive.</p></div></div><div data-preload="true" data-preload-key="intro-jason" data-preload-start="top-=100%" data-preload-end="bottom+=20%" class="_89gs0a1 _89gs0a3 _89gs0a4"><div class="_89gs0a7 _89gs0a8 _89gs0ab" data-track="jason-intro" data-track-offset="60" data-track-if="lofi"><div class="_89gs0ad _1uw8doi5 jlzlp2r jlzlp2t jlzlp2v"><h2 class="jlzlp2z l56esf5 l56esf4 l56esf0 l56esf8 jlzlp212 jlzlp210">Jason Duval</h2><div class="jlzlp214 jlzlp217 jlzlp215 jlzlp219 _1y9vcaw0"><q class="jlzlp21d _1y9vcaw4 l56esf9 l56esf2 l56esf0 l56esfb _1y9vcaw8 _1y9vcaw5">Jason wants an easy life, but things just keep getting harder.</q><p class="_1y9vcawb l56esfd l56esf2 l56esf0 l56esfe">Jason grew up around grifters and crooks. After a stint in the Army trying to shake off his troubled teens, he found himself in the Keys doing what he knows best, working for local drug runners. It might be time to try something new.</p></div><div class="jlzlp21y jlzlp221 jlzlp21z jlzlp224 jlzlp227" style="--_1nfc5st8:var(--_19z1c6dr)"></div></div><div data-speed="1" class="jlzlp2q _1uw8doi5 class="jlzlp2f _1uw8doi4 jlzlp2h"><q class="jlzlp2i l56esfk l56esf4 l56esf0 jlzlp2l jlzlp2k">If anything happens, I&#x27;m right behind you.</q></div></div><div class="jlzlp2n _1uw8doi4 jlzlp2p"><div data-speed="0.92" class="jlzlp2q _1uw8doi5 jlzlp2r jlzlp2u jlzlp2x"><div class="jlzlp214 jlzlp218 jlzlp215 jlzlp21a _1y9vcaw0"><q class="jlzlp21d _1y9vcaw4 l56esf9 l56esf2 l56esf0 l56esfb _1y9vcaw8 _1y9vcaw5">Another day in paradise, right?</q></div><div class="jlzlp21y jlzlp222 jlzlp21z jlzlp223 jlzlp229" style="--_1nfc5st8:var(--_19z1c6dr)"></div><div class="jlzlp21y jlzlp222 jlzlp21z jlzlp225 class="_1y9vcawb l56esfd l56esf2 l56esf0 l56esfe">Meeting Lucia could be the best or worst thing to ever happen to him. Jason knows how he&#x27;d like it to turn out but right now, it&#x27;s hard to tell.</p></div><div class="jlzlp21y jlzlp222 jlzlp21z jlzlp224 jlzlp22a" style="--_1nfc5st8:var(--_19z1c6dr)"></div></div></div></div><div class="_7qil390 _7qil391 jlzlp25"><div class="jlzlp2n _1uw8doi4 jlzlp2p"><div data-speed="1" class="jlzlp2q _1uw8doi5 jlzlp2r jlzlp2t jlzlp2v"><h2 class="jlzlp2z l56esf5 l56esf4 l56esf0 l56esf8 jlzlp212 jlzlp210">Jason Duval</h2><div class="jlzlp214 jlzlp217 jlzlp215 jlzlp219 _1y9vcaw0"><q class="jlzlp21d _1y9vcaw4 l56esf9 l56esf2 l56esf0 l56esfb _1y9vcaw8 _1y9vcaw5">Jason wants an easy life, but things just keep getting harder.</q><p class="_1y9vcawb l56esfd l56esf2 l56esf0 l56esfe">Jason grew up around grifters and crooks. After a stint in the Army trying to shake off his troubled teens, he found himself in the Keys doing what he knows best, working for local drug runners. It might be time to try something new.</p></div><div class="jlzlp21y jlzlp221 jlzlp21z jlzlp223 jlzlp226" style="--_1nfc5st8:var(--_19z1c6dr)"></div></div><div data-speed="1" class="jlzlp2q _1uw8doi5 style="--_1nfc5st8:var(--_19z1c6dr)"></div></div><div data-speed="0.92" class="jlzlp2q _1uw8doi5 jlzlp2s jlzlp2t jlzlp2w"><h2 class="jlzlp2z l56esf5 l56esf4 l56esf0 l56esf8 jlzlp212 jlzlp211">Lucia Caminos</h2><div class="jlzlp214 jlzlp217 jlzlp216 jlzlp21b _1y9vcaw0"><q class="jlzlp21d _1y9vcaw4 l56esf9 l56esf2 l56esf0 l56esfb _1y9vcaw8 _1y9vcaw5">Lucia’s father taught her to fight as soon as she could walk.</q><p class="_1y9vcawb l56esfd l56esf2 l56esf0 l56esfe">Life has been coming at her swinging ever since. Fighting for her family landed her in the Leonida Penitentiary. Sheer luck got her out. Lucia’s learned her lesson — only smart moves from here.</p></div><div class="jlzlp21y jlzlp221 jlzlp220 jlzlp224 jlzlp22d" style="--_1nfc5st8:var(--_19z1c6dr)"></div><div class="jlzlp214 jlzlp217 jlzlp216 jlzlp21b _1y9vcaw0"><p class="_1y9vcawb l56esfd l56esf2 l56esf0 l56esfe">More than anything, Lucia wants the good life her mom has dreamed of since their days in Liberty City — but instead of half-baked fantasies, Lucia is prepared to take matters into her own hands.</p></div></div></div><div class="jlzlp26 jlzlp28"><div class="jlzlp29 jlzlp2b jlzlp2d"><div aria-hidden="true" class="jlzlp2f _1uw8doi4 jlzlp2h"><q class="jlzlp2i l56esfk l56esf4 l56esf0 jlzlp2m jlzlp2k">The only thing that matters is who you know and what you got.</q></div></div><div class="jlzlp2n _1uw8doi4 jlzlp2p"><div data-speed="1" class="jlzlp2q _1uw8doi5 jlzlp2s jlzlp2u jlzlp2y"><div class="jlzlp214 jlzlp218 jlzlp216 jlzlp21c _1y9vcaw0"><p class="_1y9vcawb l56esfd l56esf2 l56esf0 l56esfe">Fresh out of prison and ready to change the odds in her favor, Lucia’s committed to her plan — no matter what it takes.</p></div><div class="jlzlp21y jlzlp222 jlzlp220 jlzlp224 jlzlp22g" style="--_1nfc5st8:var(--_19z1c6dr)"></div></div><div data-speed="0.92" class="jlzlp2q _1uw8doi5 jlzlp2s jlzlp2u jlzlp2y"><div class="jlzlp214 jlzlp218 jlzlp216 jlzlp21c _1y9vcaw0"><q class="jlzlp21d _1y9vcaw4 l56esf9 l56esf2 l56esf0 l56esfb _1y9vcaw8 _1y9vcaw5">A life with Jason could be her way out.</q></div><div class="jlzlp21y jlzlp222 jlzlp220 jlzlp223 jlzlp22f" style="--_1nfc5st8:var(--_19z1c6dr)"></div><div class="jlzlp21y jlzlp222 jlzlp220 jlzlp225 jlzlp22h" style="--_1nfc5st8:var(--_19z1c6dr)"></div></div></div></div><div class="_7qil390 _7qil391 jlzlp25"><div class="jlzlp2n _1uw8doi4 jlzlp2p"><div data-speed="1" class="jlzlp2q _1uw8doi5 jlzlp2s jlzlp2t jlzlp2w"><h2 class="jlzlp2z l56esf5 l56esf4 l56esf0 l56esf8 jlzlp212 jlzlp211">Lucia Caminos</h2><div class="jlzlp214 jlzlp217 jlzlp216 jlzlp21b _1y9vcaw0"><q class="jlzlp21d _1y9vcaw4 l56esf9 l56esf2 l56esf0 l56esfb _1y9vcaw8 _1y9vcaw5">Lucia’s father taught her to fight as soon as she could walk.</q><p class="_1y9vcawb l56esfd l56esf2 l56esf0 l56esfe">Life has been coming at her swinging ever since. Fighting for her family landed her in the Leonida Penitentiary. Sheer luck got her out. Lucia’s learned her lesson — only smart moves from here.</p></div><div class="jlzlp21y jlzlp221 jlzlp220 jlzlp223 jlzlp22c" style="--_1nfc5st8:var(--_19z1c6dr)"></div></div><div data-speed="1" class="jlzlp2q _1uw8doi5 jlzlp2s jlzlp2t jlzlp2w"><div class="avvi5e"><div class="avvi5f"><div class="avvi5g"><div class="jlzlp21y jlzlp221 jlzlp220 jlzlp225 jlzlp22e" style="--_1nfc5st8:var(--_19z1c6dr)"></div><div class="jlzlp21y jlzlp221 jlzlp220 jlzlp224 jlzlp22d" style="--_1nfc5st8:var(--_19z1c6dr)"></div></div></div><div class="avvi5h"><div class="_9v8pu0 _9v8pu5 _9v8pu6"></div></div></div><div class="jlzlp214 jlzlp217 jlzlp216 jlzlp21b _1y9vcaw0"><p class="_1y9vcawb l56esfd l56esf2 l56esf0 l56esff">More than anything, Lucia wants the good life her mom has dreamed of since their days in Liberty City — but instead of half-baked fantasies, Lucia is prepared to take matters into her own hands.</p></div></div></div><div class="jlzlp26 jlzlp28"><div Leonida</q><p class="_1e1y5kb3 _1y9vcawb l56esfd l56esf2 l56esf0 l56esfe">When the sun fades and the neon glows, everyone has something to gain — and more to lose.</p></div></div><div aria-hidden="true" class="avvi5b avvi5c"></div><div class="wemlvz0"><div class="wemlvz1 _1uw8doi4"><div class="wemlvz2 wemlvz4"><h2 class="wemlvzq l56esf5 l56esf4 l56esf0 l56esf8 wemlvzt">Cal Hampton</h2><div class="_7qil390 _7qil39b wemlvz17 _1y9vcaw0"><q class="wemlvz18 _1y9vcaw4 l56esf9 l56esf2 l56esf0 l56esfb _1y9vcaw8 _1y9vcaw5">What if everything on the internet was true?</q><p class="_1y9vcawb l56esfd l56esf2 l56esf0 l56esfe">Jason’s friend and a fellow associate of Brian’s, Cal feels safest hanging at home, snooping on Coast Guard comms with a few beers and some private browser tabs open.</p></div></div></div><div class="wemlvz5 wemlvz9 wemlvz6 wemlvzb"><img draggable="false" alt="" aria-hidden="true" data-speed="0.91" fetchPriority="high" decoding="async" class="wemlvz17 _1y9vcaw0"><q class="wemlvz18 _1y9vcaw4 l56esf9 l56esf2 l56esf0 l56esfb _1y9vcaw8 _1y9vcaw5">The psychopaths are in charge. Get used to it.</q><p class="_1y9vcawb l56esfd l56esf2 l56esf0 l56esfe">Cal is at the low tide of America and happy there. Casual paranoia loves company, but his friend Jason has bigger plans.</p></div></div></div><div class="_7qil390 _7qil391 wemlvzz _1uw8doi4"><div data-speed="1" class="wemlvz10 _1uw8doi5 wemlvz12 wemlvz14"><div class="wemlvz17 _1y9vcaw0"><q class="wemlvz18 _1y9vcaw4 l56esf9 l56esf2 l56esf0 l56esfb _1y9vcaw8 _1y9vcaw5">What if everything on the internet was true?</q><p class="_1y9vcawb l56esfd l56esf2 l56esf0 l56esfe">Jason’s friend and a fellow associate of Brian’s, Cal feels safest hanging at home, snooping on Coast Guard comms with a few beers and some private browser tabs open.</p></div><div class="wemlvz2m wemlvz2o wemlvz2p wemlvz2z"></div><div class="avvi5e"><div class="avvi5f"><div class="avvi5g"><div class="wemlvz2m wemlvz2o wemlvz2q wemlvz30"></div><div class="_7qil390 _7qil39b wemlvz17 _1y9vcaw0"><q class="wemlvz18 _1y9vcaw4 l56esf9 l56esf2 l56esf0 l56esfb _1y9vcaw8 _1y9vcaw5">It&#x27;s all about heart — the Jack of Hearts.</q><p class="_1y9vcawb business.</p></div></div></div><div class="wemlvz5 wemlvz9 wemlvz6 wemlvzb"><img draggable="false" alt="" aria-hidden="true" data-speed="0.91" fetchPriority="high" decoding="async" data-nimg="fill" wemlvz36 wemlvz38"><q class="wemlvz39 l56esfk l56esf4 l56esf0">The club money pay for the studio, and the drug money pay for it all.</q></div><div class="wemlvz2m wemlvz2o wemlvz2t wemlvz33"></div><div class="wemlvz17 _1y9vcaw0"><q class="wemlvz18 _1y9vcaw4 l56esf9 l56esf2 l56esf0 l56esfb _1y9vcaw8 _1y9vcaw5">Top quality cuts.</q><p class="_1y9vcawb l56esfd l56esf2 l56esf0 l56esfe">Boobie might seem like he&#x27;s just out for himself, but it&#x27;s his partnership with the young aspiring music mogul Dre&#x27;Quan for Only Raw Records that he&#x27;s most invested in — now they just need a hit.</p></div></div></div><div class="_7qil390 _7qil391 wemlvzz _1uw8doi4"><div data-speed="1" class="wemlvz10 _1uw8doi5 wemlvz12 wemlvz14"><div class="wemlvz17 _1y9vcaw0"><q Vice City legend — and acts like it. One of the few to transform his time in the streets into a legitimate empire spanning real estate, a strip club, and a recording studio — Boobie&#x27;s all smiles until it&#x27;s time to talk business.</p></div><div class="wemlvz2m wemlvz2o wemlvz2p wemlvz2z"></div><div class="avvi5e"><div class="avvi5f"><div class="avvi5g"><div class="wemlvz2m wemlvz2o wemlvz2q wemlvz30"></div><div class="wemlvz34 wemlvz36 wemlvz38"><q class="wemlvz39 l56esfk l56esf4 l56esf0">The club money pay for the studio, and the drug money pay for it all.</q></div><div class="wemlvz17 _1y9vcaw0"><q class="wemlvz18 _1y9vcaw4 l56esf9 l56esf2 l56esf0 l56esfb _1y9vcaw8 _1y9vcaw5">Top quality cuts.</q><p class="_1y9vcawb l56esfd l56esf2 l56esf0 l56esfe">Boobie might seem like he&#x27;s just out for himself, but it&#x27;s his partnership with the young aspiring music mogul Dre&#x27;Quan for Only Raw Records that he&#x27;s most invested in — now they just need a hit.</p></div></div></div></div><div data-theme="_1nfc5stn" data-theme-offset="50%" data-preload="true" data-preload-key="leonida-keys" data-preload-start="-=150%" wemlvz36 wemlvz38"><q class="wemlvz39 l56esfk l56esf4 l56esf0">Dancers are like my A&amp;Rs. If the record&#x27;s a hit, DJs gonna be spinnin&#x27; it.</q></div><div class="wemlvz2m wemlvz2o wemlvz2t wemlvz33"></div><div class="wemlvz17 _1y9vcaw0"><q class="wemlvz18 _1y9vcaw4 l56esf9 l56esf2 l56esf0 l56esfb _1y9vcaw8 _1y9vcaw5">You&#x27;re with the label now.</q><p class="_1y9vcawb l56esfd l56esf2 l56esf0 l56esfe">Now that he&#x27;s signed the Real Dimez, Dre&#x27;Quan&#x27;s days of booking acts into Boobie&#x27;s strip club might be numbered as he sets his sights on the Vice City scene.</p></div></div></div><div class="_7qil390 _7qil391 wemlvzz _1uw8doi4"><div data-speed="1" class="wemlvz10 _1uw8doi5 wemlvz12 wemlvz14"><div class="wemlvz17 _1y9vcaw0"><q class="wemlvz18 _1y9vcaw4 l56esf9 l56esf2 l56esf0 l56esfb _1y9vcaw8 _1y9vcaw5">Only Raw... Records</q><p class="_1y9vcawb l56esfd l56esf2 l56esf0 l56esfe">Dre&#x27;Quan was always more of a hustler than a gangster. Even when he was dealing on the streets to make ends meet, breaking into music was the goal.</p></div><div class="wemlvz2m wemlvz2o wemlvz2p wemlvz2z"></div><div class="avvi5e"><div wemlvz36 wemlvz38"><q class="wemlvz39 l56esfk l56esf4 l56esf0">All my dimes in this club. Meet my twin, make it a dub.</q></div><div class="wemlvz2m wemlvz2o wemlvz2t wemlvz33"></div><div class="wemlvz17 _1y9vcaw0"><q class="wemlvz18 _1y9vcaw4 l56esf9 l56esf2 l56esf0 l56esfb _1y9vcaw8 _1y9vcaw5">One hit away from fame.</q><p class="_1y9vcawb l56esfd l56esf2 l56esf0 l56esfe">An early hit single with local rapper DWNPLY took Real Dimez to new heights. Now, after five years and a whole lot of trouble, they’re signed to Only Raw Records, hoping lightning can strike twice.</p></div></div></div><div class="_7qil390 _7qil391 wemlvzz _1uw8doi4"><div data-speed="1" class="wemlvz10 _1uw8doi5 wemlvz12 wemlvz14"><div class="wemlvz17 _1y9vcaw0"><q class="wemlvz18 _1y9vcaw4 l56esf9 l56esf2 l56esf0 l56esfb _1y9vcaw8 _1y9vcaw5">Viral videos. class="wemlvz34 wemlvz36 wemlvz38"><q class="wemlvz39 l56esfk l56esf4 l56esf0">All my dimes in this club. Meet my twin, make it a dub.</q></div><div class="wemlvz17 _1y9vcaw0"><q class="wemlvz18 _1y9vcaw4 l56esf9 l56esf2 l56esf0 l56esfb _1y9vcaw8 _1y9vcaw5">One hit away from fame.</q><p class="_1y9vcawb l56esfd l56esf2 l56esf0 l56esfe">An early hit single with local rapper DWNPLY took Real Dimez to new heights. Now, after five years and a whole lot of trouble, they’re signed to Only Raw Records, hoping lightning can strike twice.</p></div></div></div></div><div data-theme="_1nfc5stp" data-theme-offset="50%" I think we&#x27;d all be wise to remember that.</q></div><div class="wemlvz2m wemlvz2n wemlvz2t wemlvz2y"></div><div class="wemlvz17 _1y9vcaw0"><q class="wemlvz18 _1y9vcaw4 l56esf9 l56esf2 l56esf0 l56esfb _1y9vcaw8 _1y9vcaw5">A professional adapts.</q><p class="_1y9vcawb l56esfd l56esf2 l56esf0 l56esfe">Raul&#x27;s recklessness raises the stakes with every score. I think we&#x27;d all be wise to remember that.</q></div><div class="wemlvz17 _1y9vcaw0"><q class="wemlvz18 _1y9vcaw4 l56esf9 l56esf2 l56esf0 l56esfb _1y9vcaw8 _1y9vcaw5">A professional adapts.</q><p class="_1y9vcawb l56esfd l56esf2 l56esf0 l56esfe">Raul&#x27;s recklessness raises the stakes with every score. Sooner or later, his crew will have to double down or pull their chips from the table.</p></div></div></div></div><div data-theme="_1nfc5stq" data-theme-offset="50%" data-preload="true" avvi5c"></div><div class="wemlvz0"><div class="wemlvz1 _1uw8doi4"><div class="wemlvz2 wemlvz4"><h2 class="wemlvzq l56esf5 l56esf4 l56esf0 l56esf8 wemlvzy">Brian Heder</h2><div class="_7qil390 _7qil39b wemlvz17 _1y9vcaw0"><q class="wemlvz18 _1y9vcaw4 l56esf9 l56esf2 l56esf0 l56esfb _1y9vcaw8 _1y9vcaw5">Nothing better than a Mudslide at sunset.</q><p class="_1y9vcawb l56esfd l56esf2 l56esf0 l56esfe">Brian&#x27;s a classic drug runner from the golden age of smuggling in the Keys. Still moving product through his boat yard with his third wife, Lori, Brian&#x27;s been around long enough to let others do his dirty work.</p></div></div></div><div class="wemlvz5 wemlvz9 wemlvz6 class="wemlvz2m wemlvz2o wemlvz2s wemlvz32"></div></div><div data-speed="0.92" class="wemlvz10 _1uw8doi5 wemlvz12 wemlvz14"><div class="wemlvz2m wemlvz2o wemlvz2p wemlvz2z"></div><div class="wemlvz34 wemlvz36 wemlvz38"><q class="wemlvz39 l56esfk l56esf4 l56esf0">I hauled so much grass in that plane, I could make the state of Leonida levitate.</q></div><div class="wemlvz2m wemlvz2o wemlvz2t wemlvz33"></div><div class="wemlvz17 _1y9vcaw0"><q class="wemlvz18 _1y9vcaw4 l56esf9 l56esf2 l56esf0 l56esfb _1y9vcaw8 _1y9vcaw5">Looks like a Leonida beach bum — moves like a great white shark.</q><p class="_1y9vcawb l56esfd l56esf2 l56esf0 l56esfe">Brian’s letting Jason live rent-free at one of his properties — so long as he helps with local shakedowns, and stops by for Lori’s sangria once in a while.</p></div></div></div><div class="_7qil390 _7qil391 wemlvzz _1uw8doi4"><div data-speed="1" class="wemlvz10 _1uw8doi5 wemlvz12 wemlvz14"><div class="wemlvz17 _1y9vcaw0"><q class="wemlvz18 _1y9vcaw4 l56esf9 l56esf2 l56esf0 l56esfb _1y9vcaw8 _1y9vcaw5">Nothing better than a Mudslide at sunset.</q><p class="_1y9vcawb l56esfd l56esf2 l56esf0 l56esfe">Brian&#x27;s a classic drug runner from the golden age of smuggling in the Keys. Still moving product through his boat yard with his third wife, Lori, Brian&#x27;s been around long enough to let others do his dirty work.</p></div><div class="wemlvz2m wemlvz2o wemlvz2p wemlvz2z"></div><div class="avvi5e"><div class="avvi5f"><div class="avvi5g"><div class="wemlvz2m wemlvz2o wemlvz2q wemlvz30"></div><div class="wemlvz2m wemlvz2o wemlvz2s wemlvz32"></div><div An officer stands nearby.\"}]]}],[\"$\",\"$L65\",null,{\"side\":\"right\",\"children\":[[\"$\",\"$L66\",null,{\"children\":\"Lucia Caminos\"}],[\"$\",\"$L67\",null,{\"size\":\"small\",\"enableFadeIn\":false,\"children\":[[\"$\",\"$L68\",null,{\"showQuotes\":false,\"children\":\"Lucia’s father taught her to fight as soon as she could walk.\"}],[\"$\",\"$L69\",null,{\"children\":\"Life has been coming at her swinging ever since. Fighting for her family landed her in the Leonida Penitentiary. Sheer luck got her out. Lucia’s learned her lesson — only smart moves from here.\"}]]}],[\"$\",\"$L6a\",null,{\"src\":{\"src\":\"/VI/_next/static/media/Lucia_Caminos_02.f833743a.jpg\",\"height\":2160,\"width\":3840,\"blurDataURL\":\"data:image/jpeg;base64,/9j/2wBDAAoHBwgHBgoICAgLCgoLDhgQDg0NDh0VFhEYIx8lJCIfIiEmKzcvJik0KSEiMEExNDk7Pj4+JS5ESUM8SDc9Pjv/2wBDAQoLCw4NDhwQEBw7KCIoOzs7Ozs7Ozs7Ozs7Ozs7Ozs7Ozs7Ozs7Ozs7Ozs7Ozs7Ozs7Ozs7Ozs7Ozs7Ozs7Ozv/wgARCAAFAAgDASIAAhEBAxEB/8QAFQABAQAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAT/xAAVAQEBAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAACA//aAAwDAQACEAMQAAABqE3/AP/EABYQAQEBAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAIBA//aAAgBAQABBQI4QD//xAAUEQEAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA/9oACAEDAQE/AX//xAAUEQEAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA/9oACAECAQE/AX//xAAZEAACAwEAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAABAgARITH/2gAIAQEABj8CZgcrk//EABgQAQADAQAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAEAEUFh/9oACAEBAAE/IUnUR2bP/9oADAMBAAIAAwAAABDz/8QAFhEAAwAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAEx/9oACAEDAQE/EHT/xAAVEQEBAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAf/aAAgBAgEBPxCP/8QAGBABAQADAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAREAITH/2gAIAQEAAT8QNLrSwOKJpz//2Q==\",\"blurWidth\":8,\"blurHeight\":5},\"context\":2,\"alt\":\"Lucia side.\",\"fadeIn\":false}],[\"$\",\"$L67\",null,{\"size\":\"small\",\"children\":[\"$\",\"$L69\",null,{\"children\":\"More than anything, Lucia wants the good life her mom has dreamed of since their days in Liberty City — but instead of half-baked fantasies, Lucia is prepared to take matters into her own hands.\"}]}]]}]]}],[\"$\",\"$L6b\",null,{\"children\":\"The only thing that matters is who you know and what you got.\"}],[\"$\",\"$L64\",null,{\"section\":\"secondary\",\"children\":[[\"$\",\"$L65\",null,{\"side\":\"left\",\"children\":[[\"$\",\"$L67\",null,{\"size\":\"small\",\"enableFadeIn\":false,\"children\":[\"$\",\"$L69\",null,{\"children\":\"Fresh out of prison and ready to change the odds in her favor, Lucia’s committed to her plan — no matter what it Fighting for her family landed her in the Leonida Penitentiary. Sheer luck got her out. Lucia’s learned her lesson — only smart moves from here.\"}]]}],[\"$\",\"$L6a\",null,{\"src\":\"$73\",\"context\":1,\"alt\":\"Lucia punching a heavy bag in a gym.\",\"fadeIn\":false}]]}],[\"$\",\"$L65\",null,{\"children\":[[\"$\",\"$L6d\",null,{\"children\":[[\"$\",\"$L6a\",null,{\"src\":\"$74\",\"context\":3,\"alt\":\"Inside a jail, Lucia and another woman are handcuffed and wearing orange jumpsuits as they walk by a window where another woman watches through the glass. An officer stands nearby.\"}],[\"$\",\"$L6a\",null,{\"src\":\"$75\",\"context\":2,\"alt\":\"Lucia in sunglasses resting her arms on the side of a pool with a tropical drink beside her and a phone on the other side.\"}]]}],[\"$\",\"$L67\",null,{\"size\":\"large\",\"children\":[\"$\",\"$L69\",null,{\"children\":\"More than anything, Lucia wants the good life her mom has dreamed of since their days in Liberty City — but instead of half-baked fantasies, Lucia is prepared to take matters into her own hands.\"}]}]]}]]}],[\"$\",\"$L6b\",null,{\"children\":\"The only thing that matters is who you know and what you got.\"}],[\"$\",\"$L64\",null,{\"section\":\"secondary\",\"children\":[[\"$\",\"$L65\",null,{\"children\":[[\"$\",\"$L67\",null,{\"size\":\"small\",\"enableFadeIn\":false,\"children\":[[\"$\",\"$L68\",null,{\"showQuotes\":false,\"children\":\"A life with Jason could be her way out.\"}],[\"$\",\"$L69\",null,{\"children\":\"Fresh out of prison and ready to change the odds in her favor, Lucia’s committed to her plan — no matter what it takes.\"}]]}],[\"$\",\"$L6a\",null,{\"src\":\"$76\",\"context\":1,\"alt\":\"Lucia holding a handgun while hiding behind a slightly open door. in Excess\"}],[\"$\",\"$La1\",null,{\"children\":\"We're a long way from the '80s, but Vice City is still the sun and fun capital of America.\"}]]}],[\"$\",\"$L9f\",null,{\"children\":[\"$\",\"$La2\",null,{\"children\":[\"$\",\"$La3\",null,{\"children\":\"The glamour, hustle, and greed of America captured in a single city. flea market, out to the VC Port, the cruise ship capital of the Records\"}],[\"$\",\"$L80\",null,{\"children\":\"Dre'Quan was always more of a hustler than a gangster. Even when he was dealing on the streets to make ends meet, breaking into music was the goal.\"}]]}],[\"$\",\"$L83\",null,{\"src\":\"$ac\",\"context\":1,\"alt\":\"Dre'Quan leaning against a bar wearing a suit at a nighttime pool party. Guests in the background are wearing swimsuits.\"}],[\"$\",\"$L6d\",null,{\"children\":[[\"$\",\"$L83\",null,{\"src\":\"$ad\",\"context\":2,\"alt\":\"The Real Dimez stand side by side in front of Dre'Quan with his hands on one of each's shoulder.\"}],[\"$\",\"$L83\",null,{\"src\":\"$ae\",\"context\":4,\"alt\":\"People gathered in a recording studio. A man is sitting in the foreground in front of equipment and Dre'Quan stands directly next to him.\"}],[\"$\",\"$L83\",null,{\"src\":\"$af\",\"context\":5,\"alt\":\"Dre'Quan in a club crossing his arms with a drink in his hand looking off to the side.\"}]]}]]}],[\"$\",\"$L82\",null,{\"children\":[[\"$\",\"$L84\",null,{\"context\":3,\"alt\":\"\"}],[\"$\",\"$L85\",null,{\"children\":\"Dancers are like my A\u0026Rs. If the record's a hit, DJs gonna be spinnin' it.\"}],[\"$\",\"$L7e\",null,{\"size\":\"small\",\"children\":[[\"$\",\"$L7f\",null,{\"children\":\"You're with the label now.\"}],[\"$\",\"$L80\",null,{\"children\":\"Now that he's signed the Real Dimez, Dre'Quan's days of booking acts into Boobie's strip club might be numbered as he sets his sights on the Vice City scene.\"}]]}]]}]],\"className\":\"_7qil390 _7qil391\"}]]}]\n"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"b0:{\"src\":\"/VI/_next/static/media/overlay.9ecb89c8.png\",\"height\":1707,\"width\":2560,\"blurDataURL\":\"data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAgAAAAFCAMAAABPT11nAAAAHlBMVEVVVVX///////8UTgVqki7////+/v7///9ylDxwlz5ZphkVAAAACnRSTlMBKBQYlzYOU1lWQN0gTgAAAAlwSFlzAAALEwAACxMBAJqcGAAAACZJREFUeJxNxrkNACAMBLB7Cey/MBIVroyeJNkFYdsgiOfLUJJWLwlyAFms6AbdAAAAAElFTkSuQmCC\",\"blurWidth\":8,\"blurHeight\":5}\n"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"41:[\"$\",\"$L8d\",null,{\"theme\":\"_1nfc5str\",\"lofiTheme\":\"_1nfc5stq\",\"location\":\"grassrivers\",\"children\":[\"$\",\"$L8e\",null,{\"children\":[\"$\",\"$L8f\",null,{\"children\":[[\"$\",\"$L90\",null,{\"children\":[\"$\",\"$L91\",null,{\"children\":[[\"$\",\"$L92\",null,{\"children\":[[\"$\",\"$L93\",null,{\"src\":{\"src\":\"/VI/_next/static/media/overlay.9ecb89c8.png\",\"height\":1707,\"width\":2560,\"blurDataURL\":\"data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAgAAAAFCAMAAABPT11nAAAAHlBMVEVVVVX///////8UTgVqki7////+/v7///9ylDxwlz5ZphkVAAAACnRSTlMBKBQYlzYOU1lWQN0gTgAAAAlwSFlzAAALEwAACxMBAJqcGAAAACZJREFUeJxNxrkNACAMBLB7Cey/MBIVroyeJNkFYdsgiOfLUJJWLwlyAFms6AbdAAAAAElFTkSuQmCC\",\"blurWidth\":8,\"blurHeight\":5}}],[\"$\",\"$L94\",null,{}]]}],[\"$\",\"$L95\",null,{\"children\":\"Explore Brian looks out of the window in the passsenger seat while Jason looks ahead behind the wheel.\"}],[\"$\",\"$L85\",null,{\"children\":\"I hauled so much grass in that plane, I could make the state of Leonida levitate.\"}],[\"$\",\"$L83\",null,{\"src\":{\"src\":\"/VI/_next/static/media/Brian_Heder_04.8b0bd870.jpg\",\"height\":2160,\"width\":3840,\"blurDataURL\":\"data:image/jpeg;base64,/9j/2wBDAAoHBwgHBgoICAgLCgoLDhgQDg0NDh0VFhEYIx8lJCIfIiEmKzcvJik0KSEiMEExNDk7Pj4+JS5ESUM8SDc9Pjv/2wBDAQoLCw4NDhwQEBw7KCIoOzs7Ozs7Ozs7Ozs7Ozs7Ozs7Ozs7Ozs7Ozs7Ozs7Ozs7Ozs7Ozs7Ozs7Ozs7Ozs7Ozv/wgARCAAFAAgDASIAAhEBAxEB/8QAFQABAQAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAL/xAAUAQEAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAD/9oADAMBAAIQAxAAAAGAKf/EABYQAQEBAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAIDFP/aAAgBAQABBQI1ej//xAAUEQEAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA/9oACAEDAQE/AX//xAAUEQEAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA/9oACAECAQE/AX//xAAYEAACAwAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAEQECIf/aAAgBAQAGPwKKPGf/xAAYEAACAwAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAABMQAhYf/aAAgBAQABPyEAJ13k/9oADAMBAAIAAwAAABAP/8QAFxEAAwEAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAERUf/aAAgBAwEBPxCLD//EABYRAQEBAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAEAIf/aAAgBAgEBPxBUcb//xAAZEAACAwEAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAARIQABMUH/2gAIAQEAAT8QzlChUHp5P//Z\",\"blurWidth\":8,\"blurHeight\":5},\"context\":5,\"alt\":\"Brian leaning against a railing with two cans in front of him. He is wearing a sleevless shirt and a bandana.\"}],[\"$\",\"$L7e\",null,{\"size\":\"small\",\"children\":[[\"$\",\"$L7f\",null,{\"children\":\"Looks like a Leonida beach bum — moves like a great white shark.\"}],[\"$\",\"$L80\",null,{\"children\":\"Brian’s letting Jason live rent-free at one of his properties — so long as he helps with local shakedowns, and stops by for Lori’s sangria once in a while.\"}]]}]]}]],\"className\":\"_7qil390 _7qil39b\"}],[\"$\",\"$L81\",null,{\"enabledOn\":\"mobile\",\"children\":[[\"$\",\"$L82\",null,{\"children\":[[\"$\",\"$L7e\",null,{\"size\":\"small\",\"children\":[[\"$\",\"$L7f\",null,{\"children\":\"Nothing better than a Mudslide at sunset.\"}],[\"$\",\"$L80\",null,{\"children\":\"Brian's a classic drug runner from the golden age of smuggling in the Keys. The woman stands behind Brian as he gives a handgun to Jason.\"}],[\"$\",\"$L83\",null,{\"src\":\"$be\",\"context\":5,\"alt\":\"Brian leaning against a railing with two cans in front of him. He is wearing a sleevless shirt and a bandana.\"}]]}]]}],[\"$\",\"$L82\",null,{\"children\":[[\"$\",\"$L84\",null,{\"context\":3,\"alt\":\"\"}],[\"$\",\"$L85\",null,{\"children\":\"I hauled so much grass in that plane, I could make the state of Leonida levitate.\"}],[\"$\",\"$L7e\",null,{\"size\":\"small\",\"children\":[[\"$\",\"$L7f\",null,{\"children\":\"Looks like a Leonida beach bum — moves like a great white shark.\"}],[\"$\",\"$L80\",null,{\"children\":\"Brian’s letting Jason live rent-free at one of his properties — so long as he helps with local shakedowns, and stops by for Lori’s sangria once in a while.\"}]]}]]}]],\"className\":\"_7qil390 _7qil391\"}]]}]\n"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"bf:{\"src\":\"/VI/_next/static/media/overlay.cbb3321f.png\",\"height\":1707,\"width\":2560,\"blurDataURL\":\"data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAgAAAAFCAMAAABPT11nAAAALVBMVEXLu5v7+fn////w5NSxhE/////+/v6QazKtoYH///+pbBSohFLU1NR8ZzfYyr14YHK8AAAAD3RSTlMBEyggplM/qHA4ZXkGkl2njAdSAAAACXBIWXMAAAsTAAALEwEAmpwYAAAAKklEQVR4nB3ISRIAIAgEsWbAHf3/cy3NMVRzj1gHAbPtjkhI9AcQRfaMCw7jAIw/rIveAAAAAElFTkSuQmCC\",\"blurWidth\":8,\"blurHeight\":5}\n"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"47:[\"$\",\"$L8d\",null,{\"theme\":\"_1nfc5str\",\"lofiTheme\":\"_1nfc5stn\",\"location\":\"kalaga\",\"children\":[\"$\",\"$L8e\",null,{\"children\":[\"$\",\"$L8f\",null,{\"children\":[[\"$\",\"$L90\",null,{\"children\":[\"$\",\"$L91\",null,{\"children\":[[\"$\",\"$L92\",null,{\"children\":[[\"$\",\"$L93\",null,{\"src\":{\"src\":\"/VI/_next/static/media/overlay.cbb3321f.png\",\"height\":1707,\"width\":2560,\"blurDataURL\":\"data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAgAAAAFCAMAAABPT11nAAAALVBMVEXLu5v7+fn////w5NSxhE/////+/v6QazKtoYH///+pbBSohFLU1NR8ZzfYyr14YHK8AAAAD3RSTlMBEyggplM/qHA4ZXkGkl2njAdSAAAACXBIWXMAAAsTAAALEwEAmpwYAAAAKklEQVR4nB3ISRIAIAgEsWbAHf3/cy3NMVRzj1gHAbPtjkhI9AcQRfaMCw7jAIw/rIveAAAAAElFTkSuQmCC\",\"blurWidth\":8,\"blurHeight\":5}}],[\"$\",\"$L94\",null,{}]]}],[\"$\",\"$L95\",null,{\"children\":\"Explore Wild Country\"}],[\"$\",\"$La1\",null,{\"children\":\"Room to breathe on the state's northern fringes.\"}]]}],[\"$\",\"$L9f\",null,{\"children\":[\"$\",\"$La2\",null,{\"children\":[\"$\",\"$La3\",null,{\"children\":\"A national landmark up against the state’s northern border, Mount Kalaga offers prime hunting, fishing, and off-road trails. Games\"}],[\"$\",\"meta\",\"3\",{\"name\":\"description\",\"content\":\"Vice City, USA. Jason and Lucia have always known the deck is stacked against them. But when an easy score goes wrong, they find themselves on the darkest side of the sunniest place in America, in the middle of a criminal conspiracy stretching across the state of Leonida — forced to rely on each other more than ever if they want to make it out alive.\"}],[\"$\",\"link\",\"4\",{\"rel\":\"canonical\",\"href\":\"https://www.rockstargames.com/VI/\"}],[\"$\",\"link\",\"5\",{\"rel\":\"alternate\",\"hrefLang\":\"en-US\",\"href\":\"https://www.rockstargames.com/VI/en-US\"}],[\"$\",\"link\",\"6\",{\"rel\":\"alternate\",\"hrefLang\":\"de-DE\",\"href\":\"https://www.rockstargames.com/VI/de-DE\"}],[\"$\",\"link\",\"7\",{\"rel\":\"alternate\",\"hrefLang\":\"es-ES\",\"href\":\"https://www.rockstargames.com/VI/es-ES\"}],[\"$\",\"link\",\"8\",{\"rel\":\"alternate\",\"hrefLang\":\"es-MX\",\"href\":\"https://www.rockstargames.com/VI/es-MX\"}],[\"$\",\"link\",\"9\",{\"rel\":\"alternate\",\"hrefLang\":\"fr-FR\",\"href\":\"https://www.rockstargames.com/VI/fr-FR\"}],[\"$\",\"link\",\"10\",{\"rel\":\"alternate\",\"hrefLang\":\"it-IT\",\"href\":\"https://www.rockstargames.com/VI/it-IT\"}],[\"$\",\"link\",\"11\",{\"rel\":\"alternate\",\"hrefLang\":\"ja-JP\",\"href\":\"https://www.rockstargames.com/VI/ja-JP\"}],[\"$\",\"link\",\"12\",{\"rel\":\"alternate\",\"hrefLang\":\"ko-KR\",\"href\":\"https://www.rockstargames.com/VI/ko-KR\"}],[\"$\",\"link\",\"13\",{\"rel\":\"alternate\",\"hrefLang\":\"pl-PL\",\"href\":\"https://www.rockstargames.com/VI/pl-PL\"}],[\"$\",\"link\",\"14\",{\"rel\":\"alternate\",\"hrefLang\":\"pt-BR\",\"href\":\"https://www.rockstargames.com/VI/pt-BR\"}],[\"$\",\"link\",\"15\",{\"rel\":\"alternate\",\"hrefLang\":\"ru-RU\",\"href\":\"https://www.rockstargames.com/VI/ru-RU\"}],[\"$\",\"link\",\"16\",{\"rel\":\"alternate\",\"hrefLang\":\"zh-TW\",\"href\":\"https://www.rockstargames.com/VI/zh-TW\"}],[\"$\",\"link\",\"17\",{\"rel\":\"alternate\",\"hrefLang\":\"zh-CN\",\"href\":\"https://www.rockstargames.com/VI/zh-CN\"}],[\"$\",\"meta\",\"18\",{\"property\":\"og:title\",\"content\":\"Grand X|S\"}]]}]]}]\ncf:[\"$\",\"$Ld2\",null,{\"children\":[[\"$\",\"$Ld3\",null,{\"src\":{\"src\":\"/VI/_next/static/media/esrb.eb620d3e.svg\",\"height\":72,\"width\":50,\"blurWidth\":0,\"blurHeight\":0},\"alt\":\"ESRB US\"}],[\"$\",\"$Ld4\",null,{\"children\":[\"May contain content inappropriate for children.\",[\"$\",\"br\",\"br0\",{}],\"Visit \",[\"$\",\"$Ld5\",\"link0\",{\"href\":\"https://www.esrb.org\",\"target\":\"_blank\",\"children\":\"esrb.org\"}],\" for rating information.\"]}]]}]\n"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"d0:[\"$\",\"$Ld6\",null,{\"locale\":\"en-US\",\"now\":\"$D2025-06-02T10:26:36.503Z\",\"timeZone\":\"UTC\",\"messages\":{\"messages\":{\"drequan_lightbox_D\":\"Dre'Quan in a club crossing his arms with a drink in his hand looking off to the side.\",\"raul_lightbox_C\":\"Raul crossing his arms while on a boat near the throttle.\",\"raul_lightbox_D\":\"Raul wearing a suit looks off into the distance. In the background people walk down a neon-lit sidewalk.\",\"vi_accessibility_description\":\"Minimizes animations, motion effects, and visual movement for improved performance.\",\"vi_accessibility_description_a11y\":\"Use the accessibility options to define if you want to minimize animations, motion effects, and visual movement, adjusting system performance.\",\"vi_accessibility_label\":\"Reduce Motion\",\"vi_accessibility_title_a11y\":\"Accessibility configuration\",\"vi_accessibility_trigger\":\"Motion\",\"vi_ambrosia_cta\":\"Explore Ambrosia\",\"vi_ambrosia_dialog_close\":\"Back\",\"vi_ambrosia_dialog_eyebrow\":\"The battle for the health and wealth of Leonida begins here.\",\"vi_ambrosia_dialog_headline\":\"Keeping\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/br\u003eLeonida\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/br\u003eSweet\",\"vi_ambrosia_dialog_paragraph\":\"In the heart of Leonida, American industry and old school values still reign supreme — whatever the cost. The Allied Crystal sugar refinery provides the jobs, while the local biker gang provides almost everything else.\",\"vi_ambrosia_lightbox_A\":\"The Ambrosia skyline at night featuring smoke stacks in the distance.\",\"vi_ambrosia_lightbox_B\":\"A motorcycle gang riding together in matching leather vests down a road in Ambrosia.\",\"vi_ambrosia_lightbox_C\":\"A man sitting behind the wheel in Ambrosia as multiple women in bikinis wash his car.\",\"vi_ambrosia_lightbox_E\":\"A field of crops burning at sunset in Ambrosia.\",\"vi_ambrosia_lightbox_I\":\"A woman hugging a man from behind in Ambrosia, draping her arm in front of him displaying the handgun she's holding.\",\"vi_announcement_date\":\"Coming\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/br\u003eMay 26\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/br\u003e2026\",\"vi_announcement_logo_alt\":\"Grand Theft Auto VI\",\"vi_boobie_lightbox_A\":\"Boobie holding a stack of cash sitting back in a chair in front of a desk with a handgun on top of it.\",\"vi_boobie_lightbox_B\":\"Boobie and Dre'Quan exiting a car. Boobie holds his phone while Dre'Quan leans against the open car door.\",\"vi_boobie_lightbox_C\":\"Boobie in a club holding a drink near his face. In the background a dancer is upside down on a pole.\",\"vi_boobie_lightbox_D\":\"At a club, Boobie is sitting while holding a stack of cash with one arm around a dancer and his other arm reaching out to another dancer.\",\"vi_boobie_name\":\"Boobie Ike\",\"vi_boobie_primary_headline\":\"It's all about heart — the Jack of Hearts.\",\"vi_boobie_primary_paragraph\":\"Boobie is a local Vice City legend — and acts like it. One of the few to transform his time in the streets into a legitimate empire spanning real estate, a strip club, and a recording studio — Boobie's all smiles until it's time to talk business.\",\"vi_boobie_quote\":\"The club money pay for the studio, and the drug money pay for it all.\",\"vi_boobie_secondary_headline\":\"Top quality cuts.\",\"vi_boobie_secondary_paragraph\":\"Boobie might seem like he's just out for himself, but it's his partnership with the young aspiring music mogul Dre'Quan for Only Raw Records that he's most invested in — now they just need a hit.\",\"vi_brian_lightbox_A\":\"Brian holding a package while pointing at a another man in a plane.\",\"vi_brian_lightbox_B\":\"Brian leaning against a railing with two cans in front of him. He is wearing a sleevless shirt and a bandana.\",\"vi_brian_lightbox_C\":\"Brian and Jason riding in a car. Brian looks out of the window in the passsenger seat while Jason looks ahead behind the wheel.\",\"vi_brian_lightbox_D\":\"A woman, Brian, and Jason stand outside talking in front of a pickup truck. The woman stands behind Brian as he gives a handgun to Jason.\",\"vi_brian_name\":\"Brian Heder\",\"vi_brian_primary_headline\":\"Nothing better than a Mudslide at sunset.\",\"vi_brian_primary_paragraph\":\"Brian's a classic drug runner from the golden age of smuggling in the Keys. Still moving product through his boat yard with his third wife, Lori, Brian's been around long enough to let others do his dirty work.\",\"vi_brian_quote\":\"I hauled so much grass in that plane, I could make the state of Leonida levitate.\",\"vi_brian_secondary_headline\":\"Looks like a Leonida beach bum — moves like a great white shark.\",\"vi_brian_secondary_paragraph\":\"Brian’s letting Jason live rent-free at one of his properties — so long as he helps with local shakedowns, and stops by for Lori’s sangria once in a while.\",\"vi_cal_lightbox_A\":\"Cal laying on top of a flamingo floaty in a pool surrounded by floating cans.\",\"vi_cal_lightbox_B\":\"People hanging out at a bar. Jason and Cal play pool in the foreground.\",\"vi_cal_lightbox_C\":\"Cal and another man playing mini golf at a course decorated with fake alligators.\",\"vi_cal_lightbox_D\":\"Cal and Jason walking side by side each holding a duffel bag.\",\"vi_cal_name\":\"Cal Hampton\",\"vi_cal_primary_headline\":\"What if everything on the internet was true?\",\"vi_cal_primary_paragraph\":\"Jason’s friend and a fellow associate of Brian’s, Cal feels safest hanging at home, snooping on Coast Guard comms with a few beers and some private browser tabs open.\",\"vi_cal_quote\":\"There are way too many birds flying around in perfect formation.\",\"vi_cal_secondary_headline\":\"The psychopaths are in charge. Get used to it.\",\"vi_cal_secondary_paragraph\":\"Cal is at the low tide of America and happy there. Casual paranoia loves company, but his friend Jason has bigger plans.\",\"vi_dimez_lightbox_A\":\"Bae-Luxe of the Real Dimez sitting in a recording studio holding headphones.\",\"vi_dimez_lightbox_B\":\"Roxy of the Real Dimez sitting behind the wheel of the car looking out the window. Dre'Quan sits next to her in the passenger seat looking out the driver's side window.\",\"vi_dimez_lightbox_C\":\"The Real Dimez dancing on top of the hood of a car with a group of people cheering them on with their phones held up.\",\"vi_dimez_lightbox_D\":\"The Real Dimez speaking into microphones in a recording studio.\",\"vi_dimez_name\":\"Real Dimez\",\"vi_dimez_primary_headline\":\"Viral videos. Viral hooks.\",\"vi_dimez_primary_paragraph\":\"Bae-Luxe and Roxy aka Real Dimez have been friends since high school — girls with the savvy to turn their time shaking down local dealers into cold, hard cash via spicy rap tracks and a relentless social media presence.\",\"vi_dimez_quote\":\"All my dimes in this club. Meet my twin, make it a dub.\",\"vi_dimez_secondary_headline\":\"One hit away from fame.\",\"vi_dimez_secondary_paragraph\":\"An early hit single with local rapper DWNPLY took Real Dimez to new heights. Now, after five years and a whole lot of trouble, they’re signed to Only Raw Records, hoping lightning can strike twice.\",\"vi_downloads_art_walls_ambrosia_postcard\":\"Ambrosia Postcard\",\"vi_downloads_art_walls_boobie_ike\":\"Boobie Ike\",\"vi_downloads_art_walls_brian_heder\":\"Brian Heder\",\"vi_downloads_art_walls_cal_hampton\":\"Cal Hampton\",\"vi_downloads_art_walls_drequan_priest\":\"Dre'Quan Priest\",\"vi_downloads_art_walls_grassrivers_postcard\":\"Grassrivers Postcard\",\"vi_downloads_art_walls_jason_lucia_01\":\"Jason and Lucia 01\",\"vi_downloads_art_walls_jason_lucia_02\":\"Jason and Lucia 02\",\"vi_downloads_art_walls_jason_lucia_branded_01\":\"Jason and Lucia 01 (With Logos)\",\"vi_downloads_art_walls_jason_lucia_branded_02\":\"Jason and Lucia 02 (With Logos)\",\"vi_downloads_art_walls_jason_lucia_motel\":\"Jason and Lucia Motel\",\"vi_downloads_art_walls_leonida_keys_postcard\":\"Leonida Keys Postcard\",\"vi_downloads_art_walls_mt_kalaga_postcard\":\"Mount Kalaga National Park file)\",\"vi_downloads_videos_download_all_text\":\"Download All\",\"vi_downloads_videos_drequan_priest\":\"Dre'Quan Priest Video Clip\",\"vi_downloads_videos_gtavi_trailer_1\":\"Grand Theft Auto VI Trailer 1\",\"vi_downloads_videos_gtavi_trailer_2\":\"Grand Theft Auto VI Trailer 2\",\"vi_downloads_videos_jason_duval\":\"Jason Duval Video Clip\",\"vi_downloads_videos_lucia_caminos\":\"Lucia Caminos Video Clip\",\"vi_downloads_videos_raul_bautista\":\"Raul Bautista Video Clip\",\"vi_downloads_videos_real_dimez\":\"Real Dimez Video Clip\",\"vi_downloads_zip_1_sub_title\":\"14 Illustrations\",\"vi_downloads_zip_1_title\":\"GTAVI Artwork\",\"vi_downloads_zip_2_sub_title\":\"17 Videos\",\"vi_downloads_zip_2_title\":\"GTAVI Character Clips\",\"vi_downloads_zip_button_text\":\"Download\",\"vi_drequan_lightbox_A\":\"The Real Dimez stand side by side in front of Dre'Quan with his hands on one of each's shoulder.\",\"vi_drequan_lightbox_B\":\"People gathered in a recording studio. A man is sitting in the foreground in front of equipment and Dre'Quan stands directly next to him.\",\"vi_drequan_lightbox_C\":\"Dre'Quan leaning against a bar wearing a suit at a nighttime pool party. Guests in the background are wearing swimsuits.\",\"vi_drequan_name\":\"Dre'Quan Priest\",\"vi_drequan_primary_headline\":\"Only Raw... Records\",\"vi_drequan_primary_paragraph\":\"Dre'Quan was always more of a hustler than a gangster. Even when he was dealing on the streets to make ends meet, breaking into music was the goal.\",\"vi_drequan_quote\":\"Dancers are like my A\u0026Rs. If the record's a hit, DJs gonna be spinnin' it.\",\"vi_drequan_secondary_headline\":\"You're with the label now.\",\"vi_drequan_secondary_paragraph\":\"Now that he's signed the Real Dimez, Dre'Quan's days of booking acts into Boobie's strip club might be numbered as he sets his sights on the Vice City scene.\",\"vi_footer_link_ccpa\":\"Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information\",\"vi_footer_link_cookie_policy\":\"Cookie Policy\",\"vi_footer_link_cookie_settings\":\"Cookie Settings\",\"vi_footer_link_corp\":\"Corporate\",\"vi_footer_link_legal\":\"Legal\",\"vi_footer_link_privacy\":\"Privacy\",\"vi_grassrivers_cta\":\"Explore Grassrivers\",\"vi_grassrivers_dialog_close\":\"Back\",\"vi_grassrivers_dialog_eyebrow\":\"The untamable jewel of Leonida’s crown.\",\"vi_grassrivers_dialog_headline\":\"Welcome to the Wetlands\",\"vi_grassrivers_dialog_paragraph\":\"You never know what lies beneath the surface of this primordial expanse. The gators may be the most famous attraction, but there are far deadlier predators and weirder discoveries among the mangroves.\",\"vi_grassrivers_lightbox_A\":\"A speed boat drives toward buildings on piers overlooking the water. In the distance is the Vice City skyline.\",\"vi_grassrivers_lightbox_B\":\"Three people covered in mud pose on an airboat in the Grassrivers with a dead alligator and wildcat. One has an automatic weapon leaning against his leg, another is holding a rifle.\",\"vi_grassrivers_lightbox_C\":\"A topdown view of two people in an airboat surrounded by alligators in the Grassrivers. One holds a gun aiming at the alligator closest to him.\",\"vi_grassrivers_lightbox_I\":\"A helicopter and two police cars chase a pick-up truck through a swamp with alligators in the Grassrivers. An airboat is seen in the background.\",\"vi_hero_play_label\":\"Watch the Trailer\",\"vi_intro_description\":\"Jason and Lucia have always known the deck is stacked against them. But when an easy score goes wrong, they find themselves on the darkest side of the sunniest place in America, in the middle of a criminal conspiracy stretching across the state of Leonida — forced to rely on each other more than ever if they want to make it out alive.\",\"vi_intro_description_large\":\"Vice City, USA.\",\"vi_jason_intro\":\"Jason embracing Lucia while looking into the distance.\",\"vi_jason_lightbox_A\":\"Jason sitting on a motorcycle holding a handgun.\",\"vi_jason_lightbox_B\":\"Jason inside a car sitting behind the wheel looking into the distance.\",\"vi_jason_lightbox_C\":\"Four men in a bar. In the foreground, Jason and Cal are at the bar with beers. In the background two men are looking their way.\",\"vi_jason_lightbox_D\":\"Jason outside on the street leaning against a tree while looking at his phone.\",\"vi_jason_lightbox_E\":\"Jason holding and aiming an automatic weapon.\",\"vi_jason_lightbox_F\":\"Jason and Cal on a boat. Jason is holding a fishing rod and Cal is holding binoculars up to his eyes.\",\"vi_jason_name\":\"Jason Duval\",\"vi_jason_primary_headline\":\"Jason wants an easy life, but things just keep getting harder.\",\"vi_jason_primary_paragraph\":\"Jason grew up around grifters and crooks. After a stint in the Army trying to shake off his troubled teens, he found himself in the Keys doing what he knows best, working for local drug runners. It might be time to try something new.\",\"vi_jason_quote\":\"If anything happens, I'm right behind you.\",\"vi_jason_secondary_headline\":\"Another day in paradise, right?\",\"vi_jason_secondary_paragraph\":\"Meeting Lucia could be the best or worst thing to ever happen to him. Jason knows how he'd like it to turn out but right now, it's hard to tell.\",\"vi_kalaga_cta\":\"Explore Mount Kalaga\",\"vi_kalaga_dialog_close\":\"Back\",\"vi_kalaga_dialog_eyebrow\":\"Room to breathe on the state's northern fringes.\",\"vi_kalaga_dialog_headline\":\"Wild, Wild Country\",\"vi_kalaga_dialog_paragraph\":\"A national landmark up against the state’s northern border, Mount Kalaga offers prime hunting, fishing, and off-road trails. In the lush surrounding backwoods, hillbilly mystics and paranoid radicals live far from the prying eyes of the government.\",\"vi_kalaga_lightbox_A\":\"A news helicopter flying over a tree-filled ridge in Mount Kalaga National Park.\",\"vi_kalaga_lightbox_B\":\"Four people riding dirt bikes through the mud in Mount Kalaga National Park. An ATV jumps behind them.\",\"vi_kalaga_lightbox_C\":\"Two people holding rifles walking side by side through the woods of Mount Kalaga National Park.\",\"vi_kalaga_lightbox_D\":\"A winding road goes between two steep hills with greenery at the top in Mount Kalaga National Park.\",\"vi_kalaga_lightbox_E\":\"A cougar stalks a herd of deer drinking from a stream in Mount Kalaga National Park.\",\"vi_kalaga_lightbox_I\":\"A person wearing a life vest kayaks toward a bridge in Mount Kalaga National Park.\",\"vi_language_selector_label\":\"Language Selector\",\"vi_language_selector_placeholder\":\"Select a Language\",\"vi_layout_meta_description\":\"Vice City, USA. Jason and Lucia have always known the deck is stacked against them. But when an easy score goes wrong, they find themselves on the darkest side of the sunniest place in America, in the middle of a criminal conspiracy stretching across the state of Leonida — forced to rely on each other more than ever if they want to make it out alive.\",\"vi_layout_meta_title\":\"Grand Theft Auto VI - Rockstar Games\",\"vi_leonida_keys_county_cta\":\"Explore Leonida Keys\",\"vi_leonida_keys_county_dialog_close\":\"Back\",\"vi_leonida_keys_county_dialog_eyebrow\":\"The dress code is casual, the bars are loaded.\",\"vi_leonida_keys_county_dialog_headline\":\"Gateway to Paradise\",\"vi_leonida_keys_county_dialog_paragraph\":\"Life in this tropical archipelago isn’t flashy but it’s easy. Get your buzz on and pull up a deck chair but look out — you are right on the doorstep of some of the most beautiful and dangerous waters in all of America.\",\"vi_leonida_keys_lightbox_A\":\"An iguana walks in front of a mobility scooter in the Leonida Keys as people pass by in the background.\",\"vi_leonida_keys_lightbox_B\":\"A seaplane flying over water in the Leonida Keys. In the background a bridge with cars connects two islands.\",\"vi_leonida_keys_lightbox_C\":\"The exterior of a beach bar in the Leonida Keys with many people: a man sits at a picnic table passed out surrounded by empty bottles, a couple is kissing, people are walking into the entrance, and others are hanging out on the front porch.\",\"vi_leonida_keys_lightbox_E\":\"Two scuba divers swimming underwater in the Leonida Keys surrounded by aquatic life including coral, fish, an eel, and a sea turtle.\",\"vi_leonida_keys_lightbox_I\":\"A gathering of people partying and drinking on boats in the water in the Leonida Keys. A man lays on a flamingo floaty. People jet ski in the background. Others are seen laying out and tanning on boats.\",\"vi_lighbox_close_label\":\"Close Lightbox\",\"vi_loader_label\":\"Loading\",\"vi_loader_no_js\":\"Javascript is disabled. Please enable Javascript and refresh the page.\",\"vi_logo_label\":\"Homepage\",\"vi_logo_return_to_top\":\"Return to Top\",\"vi_lucia_intro\":\"Lucia hugging Jason near a busy street.\",\"vi_lucia_lightbox_A\":\"Lucia punching a heavy bag in a gym.\",\"vi_lucia_lightbox_B\":\"Inside a jail, Lucia and another woman are handcuffed and wearing orange jumpsuits as they walk by a window where another woman watches through the glass. An officer stands nearby.\",\"vi_lucia_lightbox_C\":\"Lucia in sunglasses resting her arms on the side of a pool with a tropical drink beside her and a phone on the other side.\",\"vi_lucia_lightbox_D\":\"Lucia holding a handgun while hiding behind a slightly open door. On the other side a man is pointing a handgun through the open gap.\",\"vi_lucia_lightbox_E\":\"Lucia leaning on a motorcyle.\",\"vi_lucia_lightbox_F\":\"Lucia crossing her arms while holding a phone is surrounded by people dancing and flashing lights.\",\"vi_lucia_name\":\"Lucia Caminos\",\"vi_lucia_primary_headline\":\"Lucia’s father taught her to fight as soon as she could walk.\",\"vi_lucia_primary_paragraph\":\"Life has been coming at her swinging ever since. Fighting for her family landed her in the Leonida Penitentiary. Sheer luck got her out. Lucia’s learned her lesson — only smart moves from here.\",\"vi_lucia_primary_paragraph_ext\":\"More than anything, Lucia wants the good life her mom has dreamed of since their days in Liberty City — but instead of half-baked fantasies, Lucia is prepared to take matters into her own hands.\",\"vi_lucia_quote\":\"The only thing that matters is who you know and what you got.\",\"vi_lucia_secondary_headline\":\"A life with Jason could be her way out.\",\"vi_lucia_secondary_paragraph\":\"Fresh out of prison and ready to change the odds in her favor, Lucia’s committed to her plan — no matter what it takes.\",\"vi_media_card_tag_now_playing\":\"Now Playing\",\"vi_menu_description_a11y\":\"Use the navigation menu to directly navigate to sections of the page, view the trailers, or access downloads.\",\"vi_menu_downloads_cta\":\"See All Downloads\",\"vi_menu_downloads_title\":\"More\",\"vi_menu_label_downloads\":\"Downloads\",\"vi_menu_label_more\":\"More\",\"vi_menu_label_people\":\"People\",\"vi_menu_label_places\":\"Places\",\"vi_menu_label_trailers\":\"Trailers\",\"vi_menu_location_ambrosia\":\"Ambrosia\",\"vi_menu_location_gellhorn\":\"Port Keys\",\"vi_menu_location_title\":\"Places\",\"vi_menu_location_vice_city\":\"Vice City\",\"vi_menu_people_boobie\":\"Boobie Ike\",\"vi_menu_people_brian\":\"Brian Heder\",\"vi_menu_people_cal\":\"Cal Hampton\",\"vi_menu_people_dre\":\"Dre'Quan Priest\",\"vi_menu_people_jason\":\"Jason Duval\",\"vi_menu_people_lucia\":\"Lucia Caminos\",\"vi_menu_people_raul\":\"Raul Bautista\",\"vi_menu_people_real\":\"Real Dimez\",\"vi_menu_people_title\":\"People\",\"vi_menu_title_a11y\":\"Navigation menu\",\"vi_menu_trailers_tag_new\":\"New\",\"vi_menu_trailers_title\":\"Trailers\",\"vi_nav_label\":\"Expand Navigation Menu\",\"vi_newsletter_cta_button_content\":\"Get the latest game announcements, updates on special events and offers, and much more from Rockstar Games.\",\"vi_newsletter_cta_button_headline\":\"Get Rockstar Propaganda\",\"vi_newsletter_dialog_after_register_headline\":\"Confirm your subscription\",\"vi_newsletter_dialog_after_register_paragraph\":\"You did not opt-in to receive marketing emails during account creation. Would you still like to subscribe to our newsletter?\",\"vi_newsletter_dialog_already_subscribed_headline\":\"Already Subscribed\",\"vi_newsletter_dialog_already_subscribed_paragraph\":\"You are already receiving newsletter updates at this email address. Change your email preferences at any time on your account settings page.\",\"vi_newsletter_dialog_error_headline\":\"Error\",\"vi_newsletter_dialog_error_no_link_paragraph\":\"We cannot sign up this email address to our newsletter at this time.\",\"vi_newsletter_dialog_error_with_link_paragraph\":\"We cannot sign up your email address to our newsletter at this time. Change your email preferences on your account settings page or try again later.\",\"vi_newsletter_dialog_manage_link\":\"Manage Preferences\",\"vi_newsletter_dialog_no_go_back\":\"No, Go Back\",\"vi_newsletter_dialog_ok\":\"Ok\",\"vi_newsletter_dialog_success_headline\":\"Successfully Subscribed\",\"vi_newsletter_dialog_success_paragraph\":\"You are now signed up to the Rockstar Games Email List and will receive regular updates to the email address you’ve signed up with. Manage your email preferences at any time on your account settings page.\",\"vi_newsletter_dialog_yes_subscribe\":\"Yes, Subscribe\",\"vi_not_found_page_cta\":\"Return home\",\"vi_not_found_page_text\":\"The page you're looking for doesn't exist or another error occurred.\",\"vi_platform_playstation_label\":\"PlayStation 5\",\"vi_platform_playstation_label_outro\":\"PlayStation 5\",\"vi_platform_text\":\"Available on:\",\"vi_platform_xbox_label\":\"Xbox Series X|S\",\"vi_platform_xbox_label_outro\":\"Xbox Series X|S\",\"vi_port_gellhorn_cta\":\"Explore Port Gellhorn\",\"vi_port_gellhorn_dialog_close\":\"Back\",\"vi_port_gellhorn_dialog_eyebrow\":\"This is Leonida’s forgotten coast.\",\"vi_port_gellhorn_dialog_headline\":\"Live Hard\",\"vi_port_gellhorn_dialog_paragraph\":\"Cheap motels, shut-down attractions, and empty strip malls won’t bring the tourists back, but there’s a new economy in this once-popular vacation spot. It’s fueled by malt liquor, painkillers, and truck stop energy drinks. Jump on a dirt bike and hold onto your wallet.\",\"vi_port_gellhorn_lightbox_A\":\"Two men from Port Gellhorn in a room with grow lights look in the same direction. One is resting his hands on top of a shovel and the other is holding a baseball bat resting on his shoulder.\",\"vi_port_gellhorn_lightbox_B\":\"The outside of a motel in Port Gellhorn with the vacancy sign lit up at night.\",\"vi_port_gellhorn_lightbox_C\":\"A woman in Port Gellhorn leaning into the open window of a car handing a package to a man sitting in the back seat.\",\"vi_port_gellhorn_lightbox_E\":\"The outside parking lot of a club in Port Gellhorn at night with signs lit up advertising the cabaret. Several cars are parked, a few people linger outside of the club, and two people walk under the sign, one pushing a shopping cart.\",\"vi_port_gellhorn_lightbox_I\":\"People gathered at a bonfire in Port Gellhorn. One couple is off to the side with the man leaning back on the hood of a truck and the woman putting her finger to his mouth while reaching for his belt.\",\"vi_ratings_text\":\"May contain content inappropriate for children.\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/br\u003eVisit \u003clink\u003e\u003c/link\u003e for rating information.\",\"vi_raul_lightbox_A\":\"Raul holding a phone to his ear. In the background a person is sitting in front of two computer monitors.\",\"vi_raul_lightbox_B\":\"Raul driving with one hand and holding a handgun hidden with the other. A bag full of cash sits open next to him in the passenger seat.\",\"vi_raul_name\":\"Raul Bautista\",\"vi_raul_primary_headline\":\"Experience counts.\",\"vi_raul_primary_paragraph\":\"Confidence, charm, and cunning — Raul’s a seasoned bank robber always on the hunt for talent ready to take the risks that bring the biggest rewards.\",\"vi_raul_quote\":\"Life is full of surprises, my friend. I think we'd all be wise to remember that.\",\"vi_raul_secondary_headline\":\"A professional adapts.\",\"vi_raul_secondary_paragraph\":\"Raul's recklessness raises the stakes with every score. Sooner or later, his crew will have to double down or pull their chips from the table.\",\"vi_scroll_more\":\"Scroll for more content.\",\"vi_side_character_intro_body\":\"When the sun fades and the neon glows, everyone has something to gain — and more to lose.\",\"vi_side_character_intro_heading\":\"Only in Leonida\",\"vi_side_character_video_progress\":\"Video Progress\",\"vi_side_character_video_restart\":\"Rewatch Video\",\"vi_side_character_video_restart_alt\":\"Rewatch Video - {alt}\",\"vi_skip_to_content\":\"Skip to Main Content\",\"vi_vice_city_cta\":\"Explore Vice City\",\"vi_vice_city_dialog_close\":\"Back\",\"vi_vice_city_dialog_eyebrow\":\"We're a long way from the '80s, but Vice City is still the sun and fun capital of America.\",\"vi_vice_city_dialog_headline\":\"Everything in Excess\",\"vi_vice_city_dialog_paragraph_1\":\"The glamour, hustle, and greed of America captured in a single city. Each neighborhood has something to offer, from the pastel art deco hotels and bright white sands of Ocean Beach, to the bustling panaderías of Little Cuba and the bootleg brands of the Tisha-Wocka flea market, out to the VC Port, the cruise ship capital of the world.\",\"vi_vice_city_intro\":\"Tour a few of the must-see destinations across the sunshine state.\",\"vi_vice_city_lightbox_A\":\"A woman and a man standing close on a balcony overlooking a pool, trees, and the beach of Vice City.\",\"vi_vice_city_lightbox_B\":\"A jet flying over a sign that says Vice City.\",\"vi_vice_city_lightbox_C\":\"A view of Vice City with roads, palm trees, a basketball court, and more buildings in the background.\",\"vi_vice_city_lightbox_D\":\"A man in Vice City pulls back his lip showing off his grill while another man next to him points two fingers forward.\",\"vi_vice_city_lightbox_E\":\"People near a lifeguard stand on the beach in Vice City. In the foreground a woman in a bikini lays down tanning while men walk by and look. In the background a couple holds hands, a woman jogs, a woman sits on her phone, and two men play catch with a football.\",\"vi_vice_city_lightbox_F\":\"Two women being handcuffed by a police officer in Vice City. Another woman is in front of them taking a selfie, and another is posed on top of the police car as the other policeman points to the ground.\",\"vi_vice_city_lightbox_G\":\"A club in Vice City with multiple dancers around a pole as dollar bills float in the air.\",\"vi_vice_city_lightbox_H\":\"A Vice City skyline at night featuring a ferris wheel, cars driving, and tall buildings.\",\"vi_vice_city_lightbox_I\":\"A road in Vice City where cars are driving and people on dirt bikes and ATVs are performing tricks.\",\"vi_video_player_close_btn\":\"Close\",\"vi_video_player_description\":\"Catch up on the latest videos from Rockstar Games\",\"vi_video_player_heading\":\"Watch More\",\"vi_video_player_title\":\"Video Player\",\"vi_video_trailer_1_button_text\":\"Button Text 1\",\"vi_video_trailer_1_sub_title\":\"December 4, 2023\",\"vi_video_trailer_1_title\":\"Grand Theft Auto VI Trailer 1\",\"vi_video_trailer_2_button_text\":\"Button Text 2\",\"vi_video_trailer_2_sub_title\":\"May 6, 2025\",\"vi_video_trailer_2_title\":\"Grand Theft Auto VI Trailer
